expectations.text: Ambiguous prompt triggers both Phase 1 and Phase 2
expectations.evidence: Output includes both adapted docker-compose.yml/.env (Phase 1) and phase2_plan.md (Phase 2)

expectations.text: Compose file has container_name on every service
Compose file uses expose instead of ports
expectations.evidence: docker-compose.yml uses 'expose: - "${APP_PORT}"' with no ports directive
phase2_plan.md covers all 8 steps from init check through deploy report
